name: ScrapeGraphAI/Scrapegraph-ai: Python scraper based on AI - GitHub
snippet: ScrapeGraphAI is a web scraping python library that uses LLM and direct graph logic to create scraping pipelines for websites and local documents.

name: ScrapeGraphAI Tutorial | LLM-Powered Web Scraping - Medium
snippet: Learn how to easily run ScrapeGraphAI - a flexible LLM pipeline for web data extraction and how to scale it to enterprise grade solutions.

name: How to Use ScrapeGraph AI for Web Scraping - CapSolver
snippet: ScrapeGraph AI is a Python web scraping library that leverages LLMs and graph-based logic to build scraping pipelines for websites and local documents.

name: ScrapeGraphAI: Web scraping using LLM and direct graph logic
snippet: Scraper builder that uses LLMs/'magic' to generate optimised scraping rules for any page, ie css selectors and processing rules mapped to output keys.

name: From Code to Intelligence: How AI is Revolutionizing Web Scraping
snippet: LLM-powered content analysis; Multi-source document processing (HTML, XML, JSON, Markdown); Natural language-based extraction instructions ...
